title: CCL - Selecting No Noise Block
scenario: Verify "No Noise Block" option can be selected in Device Settings > Advanced on Voyager Free 60+, Voyager Free 60, and Voyager Legend 50
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the connected smartphone.
Tap on the connected device name (e.g., Voyager Free 60+).
Scroll down and tap on Advanced.
Locate the 'No Noise Block' option in the Advanced settings list.
Tap on 'No Noise Block' to select it.
expected: The 'No Noise Block' option is successfully selected, and ANC/Transparency modes are disabled. The device should operate without any noise cancellation or transparency effect.
